summary: First iteration full-stack test of AFTERGLOW Y2K scrapbook app. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passing (auth register/login/logout/me, seed-demo idempotency, scrapbook CRUD with persistence, home canvas, upload + static serving, auth gating). Frontend: full happy-path E2E executed — register on /auth, redirected home, 4 demo CDs auto-seeded, stickers/note/upload all add canvas items, NEW SCRAPBOOK creates 5th CD, clicking CD navigates to /scrapbook/:id, items persist after reload, LOGOUT + re-login works. Two non-blocking issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Sticker / tape / paper / note toolbar buttons on /scrapbook/:id have NO data-testid attributes (only btn-home, btn-upload, scrapbook-title-display, scrapbook-canvas exist). Playwright cannot reliably target them. Home.jsx exposes btn-sticker-star/smiley/cherry/bubble — add the same to ScrapbookPage for parity & testability. Functionality itself works when buttons are clicked by text/role.

integration_issues.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. The dynamic scrapbook title inside <option> is wrapped with a tracking <span>, which is invalid HTML. Causes a console error but UI still functions. Fix by rendering plain text inside <option> (or use the children directly without the wrapping span).

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to ScrapbookPage.jsx toolbar buttons (btn-sticker-star/smiley/cherry/bubble, btn-tape, btn-paper, btn-note, btn-bring, btn-back, btn-delete) for testing parity with Home.
Fix UploadWindow.jsx <option> dropdown to avoid rendering <span> inside <option> (React hydration warning).
Optional: suppress initial /api/auth/me 401 noise on unauthenticated landing (or only call after token exists).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] / MONGO_URL / DB_NAME directly — good, fails fast on missing config.
MongoDB _id properly excluded everywhere (projection {_id:0} in queries, .pop in current_user).
Passwords hashed with bcrypt (gensalt) — $2b$ format verified implicitly via login flow tests.
No brute-force lockout implemented; not requested by problem statement but worth noting.
auth cookie set httpOnly + samesite=lax, max_age=7d — matches frontend cookie+Bearer dual-mode in api.js.

CORS uses allow_credentials=True with allow_origins from env (defaults to '*') — combination of allow_credentials and '*' will be rejected by browsers; ensure CORS_ORIGINS env is set to explicit origin in production.
/api/upload accepts arbitrary file size with no max — consider size limits.
test_credentials: Ephemeral users created per-run: tester+<rand>@afterglow.com / glow1234. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists.
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers a fresh user; demo scrapbooks auto-seeded by /api/seed-demo. No manual seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_afterglow.py covers all 9 backend endpoints (auth, seed, scrapbook CRUD, home, upload). Frontend E2E covered: register→home, 4 demo CDs render on the right, stickers (star/smiley/cherry/bubble) add canvas items, note + upload + new-scrapbook modals all work, CD click navigates to /scrapbook/:id with persistence across reload, logout→login round-trip works. Known gap: ScrapbookPage toolbar lacks data-testids for sticker buttons (had to skip in-page sticker test there).
rca of the issue: 1) ScrapbookPage data-testid gap: developer copied toolbar code from Home.jsx but omitted data-testid props on sticker/tape/paper/note buttons. 2) Hydration warning: UploadWindow.jsx renders {s.title} inside <option> wrapped (by tooling/transform) in a <span> with x-source-* attrs — fix by ensuring children inside <option> are plain strings.
